ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "usd_trade_volume" REAL /* USD trading volume for the day */,
  "bitcoins_in_circulation" REAL /* Total bitcoins in circulation */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "block_size" REAL /* Size of the block */,
  "avg_block_size" REAL /* Average size of the block */,
  "orphaned_block" REAL /* Number of orphaned blocks */,
  "transactions_per_block" REAL /* Transactions per block */,
  "median_transaction_confirmation_time" REAL /* Median time taken for transaction confirmation */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total volume of the cryptocurrency traded on the given date */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the closing price compared to the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_data" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "crypto_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "miner_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by miners from transactions */,
  "transaction_fees_btc" REAL /* Transaction fees in BTC */,
  "transaction_fees_usd" REAL /* Transaction fees in USD */,
  "number_of_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions on the given date */,
  "total_transaction_value_btc" REAL /* Total value of all transactions in BTC */,
  "total_transaction_value_usd" REAL /* Total value of all transactions in USD */,
  "average_transaction_value_btc" REAL /* Average value of a single transaction in BTC */,
  "average_transaction_value_usd" REAL /* Average value of a single transaction in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_data_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_data" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record entry */,
  "crypto_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "unique_addresses" INTEGER /* Count of unique addresses for the day */,
  "total_transactions_per_day" INTEGER /* Total transactions per day */,
  "total_number_of_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions recorded */,
  "new_addresses" INTEGER /* Number of new unique addresses created on the given date */,
  "active_addresses" INTEGER /* Number of active unique addresses on the given date */,
  "total_addresses" INTEGER /* Total number of unique addresses ever created */,
  "average_transactions_per_address" REAL /* Average number of transactions per unique address on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_data_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_volume" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction volume entry */,
  "crypto_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "transaction_volume_excluding_popular_addresses" REAL /* Volume of transactions excluding popular addresses */,
  "total_output_value" REAL /* Total output value of transactions */,
  "estimated_transaction_value" REAL /* Estimated transaction value */,
  "total_input_value" REAL /* Total input value of transactions */,
  "average_transaction_volume_btc" REAL /* Average transaction volume in BTC */,
  "average_transaction_volume_usd" REAL /* Average transaction volume in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_volume_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rate entry */,
  "crypto_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "usd_aud" REAL /* Exchange rate of USD to AUD */,
  "usd_eur" REAL /* Exchange rate of USD to EUR */,
  "usd_jpy" REAL /* Exchange rate of USD to JPY */,
  "usd_cny" REAL /* Exchange rate of USD to CNY */,
  "usd_gbp" REAL /* Exchange rate of USD to GBP */,
  "usd_inr" REAL /* Exchange rate of USD to INR */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_exchange_rates_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index entry */,
  "crypto_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "nasdaq_composite" REAL /* NASDAQ Composite index value */,
  "dow_jones_industrial_avg" REAL /* Dow Jones Industrial Average value */,
  "sp500" REAL /* S&P 500 index value */,
  "crypto_index" REAL /* Index value specific to the cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency in the context of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indices_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric entry */,
  "crypto_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "hash_rate" REAL /* Hash rate of the blockchain */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty of mining */,
  "cost_percent_of_transaction_volume" REAL /* Cost as a percentage of transaction volume */,
  "average_block_time" REAL /* Average time taken to mine a block */,
  "total_transactions_in_block" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions in the block */,
  "block_reward" REAL /* Reward given to the miner for mining the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blockchain_metrics_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "inflation_rates" (
  "inflation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inflation rate record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record entry */,
  "crypto_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "us_federal_funds_rate" REAL /* US federal funds interest rate */,
  "breakeven_inflation_rate" REAL /* Breakeven inflation rate */,
  "crypto_inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate specific to the cryptocurrency */,
  "supply_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the cryptocurrency supply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inflation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inflation_rates_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
